name: Red Snapper Veracruz
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds red snapper or other whitefish
2 pounds fresh or canned tomatoes - chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange slices of fish in a large oiled casserole or baking dish.
2. Mix all the other ingredients together in a saucepan.
3. Simmer together for about 5 minutes.
4. Pour over the fish.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 to 20 minutes.
